ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school associated with the project */,
  "upper_limit_space_allocation" INTEGER /* Upper limit of space allocation for the project */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the factor used to calculate space allocation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the project */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current status of the project */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the current status */,
  "modified_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the project details were last modified */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of the project (e.g., research, academic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES project_factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the school */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the school */,
  "total_space_allocated" INTEGER /* Total space allocated to the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the owner belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "space_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each space allocation */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project being allocated space */,
  "allocated_space" INTEGER /* Space allocated to the project */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the space was allocated */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the space allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_space_allocations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project that was modified */,
  "modified_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was modified */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made to the project */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_history_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the factor */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, owner) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "space_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each space request */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project making the space request */,
  "requested_space" INTEGER /* Space requested by the project */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the space was requested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the space request (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_space_requests_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "space_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the space allocation being audited */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the space request being audited */,
  "modified_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the space allocation or request was modified */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made to the space allocation or request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_space_audit_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES space_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_space_audit_allocation_id FOREIGN KEY ("allocation_id") REFERENCES space_allocations ("allocation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project related to the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., space allocation, project update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_stakeholders" (
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stakeholder */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project the stakeholder is associated with */,
  "stakeholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the stakeholder */,
  "stakeholder_email" TEXT /* Email address of the stakeholder */,
  "stakeholder_role" TEXT /* Role of the stakeholder (e.g., sponsor, team member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stakeholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_stakeholders_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project the document is associated with */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., report, presentation) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
